fields.summary: TXYZA4567S - Duplicate SIP deduction same month
fields.description: SIP deducted twice in same month. Customer requesting refund.

analysis.summary: TXYZA4567S - Duplicate SIP deduction same month
analysis.description: SIP deducted twice in same month. Customer requesting refund.

comments.body: Duplicate transaction detected in event logs — race condition in SIP scheduler. Second deduction reversed by ops team. Customer refunded within 3 working days.
comments.author: support-agent@fundsindia.com
